summary: Bioriidl operates within the riidl (Research Innovation Incubation Design Laboratory) ecosystem at Somaiya Vidyavihar University, Mumbai — providing broader incubation, labs, and startup support beyond bio-specific programs.

riidl_labs.name: Fabrication Lab (FABLAB)
riidl_labs.description: MIT-supported fabrication space with 3D printers and precision machines for prototyping

riidl_labs.name: Media Lab
riidl_labs.description: Multimedia production tools for content creation and editing

riidl_labs.name: AI/ML Lab
riidl_labs.description: Advanced computing resources for artificial intelligence and machine learning research

riidl_labs.name: AR/VR Lab
riidl_labs.description: Augmented and virtual reality tools for immersive digital experiences

riidl_labs.name: Bio Lab
riidl_labs.description: BIRAC-supported life sciences lab for biology, genetics, and biotechnology research (connected to Bioriidl DIY Biolab)

facility_booking: Labs can be booked via https://riidl.org/booking for students, faculty, startups, riidl staff, and lab members
